What We Do

Our Roofing Services

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof or loft conversion, we cover every aspect of pitched and flat roofing for homes and businesses across Derbyshire.

New Roofs & Re-Roofing

Complete tiled and slate roof installations and full strip-and-recover work using quality, long-lasting materials.

Roof & Slate Repairs

Slipped or broken tiles and slates, leaks, ridge and verge repairs — diagnosed properly and put right to stop further damage.

Loft Conversions

Roofing works for loft conversions and dormer builds — from structural openings to a fully weathertight finish.

EPDM Flat & Rubber Roofs

Hard-wearing EPDM rubber and flat roof systems for extensions, dormers, garages and outbuildings.

Chimney Repairs & Leadwork

Chimney repairs, repointing and rebuilds, plus precision leadwork around valleys, flashings and abutments.

Dormer Repairs & Velux Windows

Dormer repairs and Velux roof window supply and fit, bringing extra light into loft and roof spaces.

Fascias, Soffits & Guttering

uPVC fascias, soffits and seamless guttering — protecting your roofline and keeping water away from the building.

Cement Work & Pointing

Roof and ridge cement work, bedding and pointing to keep your roofline solid and weathertight.

See The Difference

Before & After

Watch four recent projects go from tired to transformed — real roofs, real results, all completed here in Derbyshire.

Before → After
Slate Re-Roof

A tired roof made watertight again

We stripped this worn, leaking slate roof right back, then re-covered it with new natural slate over a breathable membrane and fresh battens. The chimney was re-flashed and the ridge re-bedded, leaving a roof that's straight, smart and built to keep the weather out for decades to come.

Belper
Before → After
Conservatory Warm Roof

From cold add-on to year-round room

This old polycarbonate conservatory roof was freezing in winter and baking in summer. We replaced it with a fully insulated, tiled warm roof — quiet, energy-efficient and finished with a smooth plastered ceiling inside. A wasted space became a bright room the family now uses all year round.

Ripley
Before → After
Full Re-Roof

Stripped back and built to last

Taken right back to the rafters and rebuilt properly: new felt, treated battens and interlocking tiles, with fresh ridge, verge and leadwork throughout. The finish is clean and uniform — sealing the whole home against the worst of the Derbyshire weather.

Matlock
Before → After
Loft Conversion Re-Roof

A new roofline for a bigger home

As part of a full loft conversion we re-roofed the entire property — new structure, membrane and tiles bringing the whole roofline up to a modern, weatherproof standard, ready for the extra living space created below.

Derby

About Us

The Team Behind Holt Roofing

Holt Roofing Ltd is a Derbyshire-based roofing company built on a simple idea: do the job properly, treat people fairly, and stand behind the work. From small repairs to full re-roofs and loft conversions, every job gets the same care and attention to detail.

We pride ourselves on being experienced and trusted — turning up when we say we will, keeping you informed, and leaving your property clean and tidy. With free advice, free quotes and a 24-hour emergency call-out, help is never far away.

Josh Holt
Owner, Holt Roofing Ltd
